name: Summer Vegetable Bowl
recipeIngredient: 6 Ears of corn, broken into 1/3 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preparation and cooking: Approximately 1 hour.
1. In a 6-quart Dutch oven over medium heat, fry the bacon until it is crisp. Drain on paper towels.
2. To the drippings in the Dutch oven, add the onions and green pepper. Cook until they are golden brown. Add hot water and the next five ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add the zucchini and celery. Cover and cook until all vegetables are tender, about 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Using a slotted spoon, arrange the vegetables on a large platter or in a large shallow bowl. Crumble the bacon over the top and sprinkle with salt, sugar, and pepper. Arrange the tomato wedges on top.
